problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
